name: what-makes-it-war
prompt: Close-up, tight framing. Older woman's face, eyes intense. Delivering the core truth. Sharp features, silver-streaked hair. Cool blue light from left side. Expression grave, meaningful. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Reva
dialogue.text: Also not wrong. That's what makes it war. That's what makes it matter.

name: sera-pushes-back
prompt: Medium shot. Young brunette woman leaning forward slightly, engaged now. Pushing back — needing to hear the counterargument. Dark fitted attire with tech accents. Cool blue-white transport lighting. Expression challenging, searching. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Sera
dialogue.text: What about weight? What about consequence? If nothing ends, does anything matter?

name: the-cage
prompt: Close-up. Older woman responding with precision, eyes holding Sera's gaze. Sharp features, silver-streaked hair pulled back. Expression intense, teaching. Cool blue light creating dramatic shadows on face. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Reva
dialogue.text: Mortality wasn't meaning. Mortality was the cage. Every value humanity ever held was shaped by scarcity. By fear. By the knowledge of ending.

name: the-freedom
prompt: Medium shot. Older woman continuing, expression opening slightly. The argument completing itself. Sovereignty uniform, cool blue-white lighting. Hands visible, gesture of opening. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Reva
dialogue.text: Remove the cage and you discover what humans actually want when they're not terrified.
